title: Add option Copy to another board for Monday docs
excerpt: Please add option “Copy to another board” for Monday docs. For now it is not possible to copy them via Connection boards or automation. But it is very useful for huge boards when we don’t want to overload them with items…

posts.author: OlgaIgnateva (Olga)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add option “Copy to another board” for Monday docs. For now it is not possible to copy them via Connection boards or automation. But it is very useful for huge boards when we don’t want to overload them with items and copy old to another board for statistic.
